pta_ampseq_combined_dry_v1.label: Combined PTA + HHS and AmpSeq + ODTC one-column dry deck

items.instruction: Seat the p10 filter-tip rack; columns 1 and 2 must be intact.
items.why: The PTA dry lysis and reaction motions use these two tip columns and return them.

items.instruction: Seat the p50 filter-tip rack; columns 1 and 2 must be intact.
items.why: The AmpSeq PCR1 and PCR2 dry master-mix motions use these positions.

items.instruction: Seat the p300 filter-tip rack; column 1 must be intact.
items.why: The dry cleanup rehearsal uses this rack and returns tips.

items.instruction: Seat one bare, empty sacrificial work plate squarely in the site.
items.why: This is the single plate moved through the HHS, magnet, and ODTC landing sites.

items.instruction: Seat the empty source plate; PTA source columns 1 and 3 must be clear.
items.why: The dry runner models PTA and AmpSeq source geometry here. No reagent is loaded.

items.instruction: Install and align the correct magnet block; leave its plate landing site empty.
items.why: The work plate is delivered here for the AmpSeq cleanup rehearsal.

items.instruction: Seat the empty trough; A1, A2, A3, A4, and A12 must be empty and clear.
items.why: The dry cleanup models beads, ethanol, elution, and waste at these wells.

items.instruction: Seat the park plate squarely with the correct lid flat, centered, and unable to rock.
items.why: The iSWAP carries this lid to the HHS and ODTC plate, then returns it here.

items.instruction: Confirm the HHS nest is empty, open, idle, and clear through the iSWAP path.
items.why: The PTA plate and lid land here. The dry sequence does not heat or shake the HHS.

items.instruction: Confirm the ODTC nest is empty, open, cool, idle, and clear through the iSWAP path.
items.why: The AmpSeq plate and lid land here twice. The dry sequence does not contact or heat the ODTC.

global_checks.instruction: Confirm every pipetting channel is untipped.
global_checks.why: The modeled starting state assumes clear channels.

global_checks.instruction: Confirm the iSWAP holds nothing and every transfer path is clear.
global_checks.why: A stale plate, lid, or obstruction makes the modeled deck state false.

global_checks.instruction: Confirm all carriers are locked at rails 48, 35, 27, and 20.
global_checks.why: The validated geometry is tied to these exact carrier rails and positions.

global_checks.instruction: Confirm there are no samples, reagents, ethanol, or water on the deck.
global_checks.why: This release envelope is an empty-labware dry rehearsal only.

global_checks.instruction: A trained operator remains at the deck with immediate E-stop access.
global_checks.why: No software interface replaces continuous physical observation.
